note: REVERSIBLE purge / cold archive (atlas_cold_archive.py). NEVER hard-deletes. Creates a SEPARATE 'archive' schema (archive.business_cold lz4-compressed + archive.tombstone index); purge candidate = ICP-fail AND enrich-fail AND aged (>=ARCHIVE_AGE_DAYS, default 90). Two-phase fail-closed: copy row+children to cold + write tombstone, THEN delete the hot row only after verified. One-command restore by domain/region/reason/date/tombstone-id. First apply = fetch+sha-verify + --selftest + ensure-schema + a DRY-RUN purge (reports candidate count, writes/deletes NOTHING). To enforce: run 'purge --apply'. Restore: 'restore --domain X --apply'.

steps.note: Reversible archive. Replaces the ICP filter's old hard-DELETE prune. Hot rows are NEVER removed without an archived copy + permanent tombstone. Storage win ~-53% to -78% at 20M rows, fully restorable.

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS reversible cold-archive purge (icp_fail AND enrich_fail AND aged; DRY-RUN unless invoked with purge --apply)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=12
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=ARCHIVE_AGE_DAYS=90
Environment=ATLAS_COLD_INDB=1
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_cold_archive.py purge
TimeoutStartSec=60min

[Unit]
Description=Run ATLAS cold-archive purge daily (DRY-RUN until promoted to purge --apply)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=12min
OnCalendar=*-*-* 04:30:00
Persistent=true
Unit=atlas-cold-archive.service

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_cold_archive.py':'6209974dc69beca2036c5f51d8c1ba8e471d97409ca8a9505a4a990f23c4ce2a'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"
